summary:
Levosimendan is an inotropic agent primarily used in cardiovascular conditions and is not associated with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis. Available literature contains no evidence suggesting efficacy of levosimendan for treating ALS.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$
